Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class EqualizerProfile

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.EqualizerProfile
  • public class EqualizerProfile
extends java.lang.Object
    Equalizer Profile that contains more than just an EqualizerConfiguration

    Used to be able to store EqualizerConfiguration along with a name.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected boolean swigCMemOwn  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      protected EqualizerProfile​(long cPtr, boolean cMemoryOwn)  
        EqualizerProfile​(java.lang.String id, java.lang.String name, EqualizerConfiguration eq_config, EqualizerPositions eq_positions)
      Construct a new Equalizer Profile object with all possible data

      Sets up an equalizer profile with id, name, eq_config and eq_positions.
      The id is on a standard UUID hexadecimal format.

    • Constructor Detail

      • EqualizerProfile

        protected EqualizerProfile​(long cPtr,
                           boolean cMemoryOwn)

      • EqualizerProfile

        public EqualizerProfile​(java.lang.String id,
                        java.lang.String name,
                        EqualizerConfiguration eq_config,
                        EqualizerPositions eq_positions)
        Construct a new Equalizer Profile object with all possible data

        Sets up an equalizer profile with id, name, eq_config and eq_positions.
        The id is on a standard UUID hexadecimal format. If the ID is invalid,
        an exception will be thrown.

        Parameters:
        id - A standard UUID on hexadecimal format
        name - The name of the EqualizerProfile
        eq_config - The EqualizerConfiguration object of the EqualizerProfile
        eq_positions - The EqualizerPositions object of the EqualizerProfile
